translation: self.assertFalse(encoder.isEncodeEquals("Murphy", " "), "Expected no match when comparing 'Murphy' with a space")
self.assertTrue(encoder.isEncodeEquals(" P rz e m y s l", " P sh e m e sh i l"))
encoder.isEncodeEquals("R o s o ch o w a c ie c", " R o s o k ho v a ts e ts")
self.assertEqual("ae io  u", encoder.removeAccents("áé íó  ú"))
